text: Implement a real-time importance scoring mechanism using a lightweight, distributed hash table (DHT) to dynamically rank and prioritize critical, recently modified, and high-value memory segments. This ensures our agent always focuses on the most relevant and impactful data, avoiding the pitfalls of static importance scoring and Docker overhead.
reason: This directly addresses the 'Why' in the plan by enhancing memory prioritization. The DHT allows for efficient, decentralized scoring without relying on a single point of failure or latency, aligning with the goal of improved performance and reliability.
